description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly dark metallic body accented by vivid orange lines and geometric patterns. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the main fuselage, giving it a stealthy, aggressive appearance. The upper surface features a raised, enclosed cockpit with a red-tinted canopy, and the fuselage is adorned with hexagonal and panel-like textures. The side profile reveals a prominent dorsal fin and a pair of engine pods mounted above the main body, suggesting advanced propulsion. The tail section is compact, with a vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers, contributing to its unique silhouette. The overall design is reminiscent of a high-performance, possibly combat-oriented urban aircraft.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with dark metallic surfaces, orange accents, swept-back wings, and a raised cockpit with a red canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply swept wings, central cockpit, and angular nose with orange highlights.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the dorsal fin, raised engine pod, and detailed panel textures along the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the compact tail, vertical stabilizer, and the integration of the wings into the main body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engine pod, cockpit placement, and geometric surface details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with integrated wing roots and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted dorsally above the main fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Single vertical stabilizer with no visible horizontal stabilizers, forming a compact tail section.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a red-tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
